case_title: URENA, VIVIAN M. vs. SALIN, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF URENA, VIVIAN M. AS TO DEFENDANT SALIN, PAUL DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-03-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-16-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-03-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED FROM 1/3/97. HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-28-1997, DISMISSAL BASED ON PLTF'S FAILURES TO APPEAR AT SC ON 1-24-97;SC & OSC ON 2-26-97; SC & OSC ON 3-28-97, PLTF'S FAILURE TO PAY $50.00 SANCTION IMPOSED ON 2-26-97. DISMISSAL BASED ON CCP 575.2 AND CA CASUALTY INDEMNITY INS. CO VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-24-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-24-1997, OSC FOR PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WHY FURTHER SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-26-1997 CONTINUED FROM JAN-24-1997 TO FEB-26-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-26-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-26-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR TODAY, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $75 IMPOSED ON PLTF'S ATTORNEY. HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
